product.project_description: Personal portfolio website presenting professional achievements, projects, education, and publications in AI, computer vision, robotics, and electrical engineering.
product.problem_statement: Showcase portfolio work and academic profile in a high-performance, accessible, and responsive static website mapped to a custom domain.
product.target_users: Recruiters, hiring managers, academic advisors, collaborators, and other developers.
key_goals: Maintain high loading speed and optimize largest contentful paint (LCP).
Ensure full accessibility (a11y) including semantic HTML, proper contrast, and keyboard navigation.
Provide a responsive layout across mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.
Keep project details structured with clean modal interfaces and custom details pages.
Maintain clean visual design with custom CSS styling.

design_principles: Clean, legible layout with strong visual hierarchy
Interactive element responsiveness (modals, active navigation, animations)
High performance and optimized asset loading

workflow.development_workflow: Track-based spec and checklist development, utilizing local HTTP server verification and browser-devtool testing.
workflow.git_strategy: Feature branches per development track, merged to master after layout and accessibility verification.
workflow.verification_steps: Run local server check, audit page with Chrome DevTools (a11y and performance tools), and verify asset references.
